info.description: Reference to a video hosted on Cloudflare Stream. Strapi does not store the video file itself — use the upload button on this field in the admin (pushes to Cloudflare Stream via POST /api/lessons/:id/video), or paste a UID by hand if you uploaded to Cloudflare yourself.

videoUid.description: Cloudflare Stream video UID. Auto-filled by the upload button above; can still be pasted by hand if you uploaded via the Cloudflare dashboard instead.

durationSeconds.description: Optional cached duration in seconds, useful for UI before the player loads.

thumbnail.description: Poster image for the video. Stored via the S3 upload provider.

captionsUrl.description: Optional URL to a VTT captions/subtitles track.

status.description: Encoding status, useful if you sync this from Cloudflare's webhook/API.
